tracks.meaning: a mass of bubbles formed on the surface of a liquid, especially on beer or coffee
a collection of gas bubbles trapped in a solid or liquid substance
to produce or gather foam on a surface
saliva or froth produced by an animal, especially when exerted or diseased
a lightweight cellular material made from plastic or rubber used in cushioning and insulation
white frothy water created by breaking waves on the ocean or shore
trivial or insubstantial talk or ideas lacking depth
protein-rich froth produced by certain aquatic insects or marine organisms
